Invest with The Chocolate Future

Privacy Policy

Last updated: July 14, 2026

Introduction

The Chocolate Future (“we,” “us,” or “our”) is committed to protecting your privacy and personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or engage with our investment platform.

Information We Collect

Personal Information You Provide

When you interact with The Chocolate Future, we may collect:

  • Contact information (name, email address)
  • Investment inquiry details
  • Company or organizational affiliation
  • Communication preferences

Automatically Collected Information

Our servers may automatically collect:

  • IP addresses and device identifiers
  • Browser type and version
  • Pages visited and time spent
  • Referring website URLs

Third-Party Services

We do not use third-party analytics or tracking services that collect personally identifiable information. Any data collected is handled in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

How We Use Your Information

We use collected information to:

  • Respond to investment inquiries
  • Process membership applications
  • Communicate about The Chocolate Future’s initiatives
  • Improve our website and services
  • Comply with legal obligations

Data Sharing

We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share data only when necessary to:

  • Fulfill legal requirements
  • Protect our rights or others’ safety
  • Complete business transactions

Your Rights

You have the right to:

  • Access your personal data
  • Request corrections to inaccuracies
  • Request deletion of your data
  • Opt out of communications
  • Withdraw consent where applicable

Data Security

We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information. However, no internet transmission is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

Children’s Privacy

Our services are not directed to children under 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

Links to External Sites

Our website may contain links to other websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these external sites.

Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. The updated version will be effective when posted on this page.

Contact Us

For questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us at:

  • Email: info@chocolatefund.com
